sectionIntro.title: Services built around real livelihoods
sectionIntro.description: Each programme is designed with one goal — to give people the financial tools and confidence to grow on their own terms.

services.title: Micro Loans
services.summary: Collateral-free loans from ₹10,000 to ₹2,00,000 for income-generating activities, repaid through flexible weekly or monthly schedules.
details: No collateral or guarantor required for first-time borrowers
Flexible repayment cycles aligned to income patterns
Transparent interest rates with no hidden processing fees
Top-up loans available on consistent repayment history

services.title: Women Empowerment Programs
services.summary: Dedicated lending circles and skill-building cohorts that help women start and scale their own enterprises with peer support.
details: Self-help group (SHG) formation and mentorship
Priority access to working-capital loans for women-led businesses
Leadership and negotiation workshops
Childcare-friendly meeting schedules at local centres

services.title: Financial Literacy
services.summary: Practical, jargon-free training on budgeting, saving, digital payments, and responsible borrowing — delivered in local languages.
details: Household budgeting and cash-flow planning workshops
Digital banking and UPI safety training
Understanding credit scores and loan terms
Goal-based savings planning for education and emergencies

services.title: Small Business Support
services.summary: Beyond capital — mentorship, market linkages, and operational guidance to help micro-enterprises become resilient businesses.
details: One-on-one business advisory from field officers
Linkages to local supplier and buyer networks
Basic bookkeeping and inventory management training
Support with licensing and government scheme registration

services.title: Savings & Development Programs
services.summary: Structured savings products and community development initiatives that build long-term financial resilience beyond the loan cycle.
details: Recurring deposit schemes with low minimum balances
Goal-linked savings for education, health, and housing
Community infrastructure micro-grants in served villages
Insurance-linked savings for risk protection
